title: Mexi Mexican Lady Lyrics Maharaja (Mahaaraaja) Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Hariharan
Song: Mexi Mexican Lady        
Movie: Maharaja
Lyrics: Na. Muthukumar 

Mexi Mexican Lady, 
en nenjukula nee vaadi
Unnaalthaan en idhayam thudikumadi
Mexi Mexican Lady, 
en nenjukula nee vaadi
Unnaalthaan en ulagam sulalumadi...

Unazhaginil imaigal kushikka,Un aruginil nimidam inika
Thaniyaai thavipathu kadhalil kudumaiyaadi
En aasaigal unnidaa uraikka, varum vaarthaigal valiyil vazhukka
Mounam thaane kadhalil maranamadi..

Mexi Mexican Lady, en nenjukula nee vaadi
Unnaalthaan en idhayam thudikumadi ...  oh baby
Mexi Mexican Lady, en nenjukula nee vaadi
Unnaalthaan en ulagam sulalumadi...

Un pechai ketkathaan nenjam yengum ennathaan seivadhu
Un paathai thaedi en kaalgal odum ennathaan seivadhu
Un moochu kaatru en aayul thedum ennathaan seivadhu
Nnee parthum paakkaamal ponnale nan ennathaan seivadhu

Kattipotu vaithaal kooda manasu ketkavillai
Vettivitu pogathaane kadhal nagamum illai
Poovai verodu killaadhe, Ennai Uyirodu kollaadhe
Odi olindhaalum nan undhan pinnale varuvene
Mexi Mexican Lady, en nenjukula nee vaadi ...

Unnai thozhaivil paarthale ennulle ennavo aanadhu
Un thozhil saaindhale ninaivin ulle ennavo aanadhu
En kadhal yekangal padhiyil penne ennavo aanadhu
Adhu unmai kaankindra kanavai pola ennavo aanadhu

Unnai partha pinnal thaane nanum mariponen
Undhan idhyam mattum enno maravillai penne
Maatram illadha aal endru mannil yaarum thaan kidayaadhu
Undha manam marum naalaithaan enni kaathirupen

Mexi Mexican Lady, en nenjukula nee vaadi
Unnaalthaan en idhayam thudikumadi ...  oh baby

Unazhaginil imaigal kushikka,Un aruginil nimidam inika
Thaniyaai thavipathu kadhalil kudumaiyaadi
En aasaigal unnidaa uraikka, varum vaarthaigal valiyil vazhukka
Mounam thaane kadhalil maranamadi..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mexi Mexican Lady'?

The song expresses a playful and romantic sentiment, celebrating love and attraction.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Maharaja'?

This song is featured in a lively sequence that highlights the chemistry between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by D Imman.

When was 'Mexi Mexican Lady' released?

The song was released on April 6, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mexi Mexican Lady, the vibrant energy of the song captures the playful romance between the characters in Maharaja. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it a delightful listen. The upbeat melody, combined with Hariharan's captivating vocals, creates an atmosphere of love and festivity. This song perfectly encapsulates the essence of youthful romance and the excitement of new love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mexi Mexican Lady is a vibrant celebration of love, showcasing the enchanting vocals of Hariharan. This catchy number from the movie Maharaja combines playful lyrics with an upbeat rhythm, making it a perfect addition to any festive playlist. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that captures the essence of romance and joy.
stanzaMeanings: Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart. You make my heart beat... Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart. You make my world beautiful...
In your beauty, there are joys. Today, there is a moment near you. In love, being alone is a burden. My desires speak of you, and words come to life. Silence is the death of love...
Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart... oh baby. Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart. You make my world beautiful...
When I hear your voice, my heart does everything. When I search for your path, my feet do everything. The breeze from your lips seeks my life. Without you looking at me, I do everything...
Even if I try to hold on, my heart doesn't listen. Love's sweetness doesn't leave me. Don't take my life away from me. Even if I run away, I will come back to you...
Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart...
When I see you in my dreams, what is it that I feel inside? When I think of my work, what memories come to mind? The love I have for you is like a dream that is true...
After seeing you, I have forgotten myself. I can't forget your charm. In this world, no one is without change. I will wait for that heart to return...
Mexi Mexican Lady, you are in my heart... oh baby.
In your beauty, there are joys. Today, there is a moment near you. In love, being alone is a burden. My desires speak of you, and words come to life. Silence is the death of love..
